steps.title: Find angle N in radians
steps.content:
Angle $M$ measures
$$\frac{\pi}{2(12)}=\frac{\pi}{24}$$
Angle $N$ is $12$ times angle $M$, so $N=\frac{\pi}{2}$ radians.

steps.title: Convert radians to degrees
steps.content:
Multiply by the radian-to-degree conversion factor:
$$\frac{\pi}{2}\cdot\frac{180}{\pi}=90$$
The answer is B.
